title: 8 Entryway Essentials for a Warm First Impression
excerpt: The entryway sets the tone for everything that follows. These 8 picks — from a proper console table to the right mirror — make any entryway feel welcoming, organized, and designed.
author: At Home Plans Team

pinterestPins.headline: Entryway Essentials — First Impressions
pinterestPins.subCopy: 8 picks for a welcoming, organized entry

pinterestPins.headline: The Console + Mirror Edit
pinterestPins.subCopy: Two pieces that do all the work

pinterestPins.headline: Hook, Tray, Rug
pinterestPins.subCopy: The entryway trio that ends the chaos

body:
The entryway is the smallest room in the house and the most neglected — but it's the first thing you see when you walk in and the last thing you touch when you leave. Getting it right is less about size and more about function: a place to land your keys, hang your coat, and catch a quick mirror check before heading out. Add a warm light source and a natural-fiber rug, and suddenly every arrival feels like coming home. These 8 picks work in even the narrowest entry.

## Shop the List

- [Slim Console Table (Natural Wood)](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-81374025)
- [Full-Length or Large Arched Mirror](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-81785396)
- [Wall-Mounted Hook Rail (Brass)](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-86301920)
- [Natural Fiber Doormat or Runner](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-82201445)
- [Catchall Tray (Ceramic or Marble)](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-94685951)
- [Small Table Lamp or Plug-In Sconce](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-87922407)
- [Umbrella Stand or Storage Basket](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-91201554)
- [Small Potted Plant (Trailing or Upright)](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-85012893)

---

*Even a narrow entryway can be planned to maximize storage and flow. A scaled entry floor plan helps you choose the right console depth and mirror size. Browse plans at [athomeplans.com](https://athomeplans.com).*
